brand.name: Irish Grid
brand.tagline: What's really powering Ireland — and what we waste
brand.independence: Independent · not affiliated with EirGrid or SONI

footer.independenceBody: Irish Grid is an independent project. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to EirGrid, SONI, or any system operator.
footer.financialBody: Bitcoin figures depend on volatile market prices and are illustrative. Nothing on this site is financial or investment advice.
footer.estimatesBody: Short-period curtailment and cost figures are modelled estimates. Annual figures use official EirGrid Constraint & Curtailment reports.
footer.rights: © {year} Irish Grid. Built on public data.
